notes_on_identifier_policy: Stable family identifiers are preferred over stale older Υ numbering in legacy planning mirrors.
Proposed Υ-B prompt seeds below are local checkpoint labels anchored to existing family identifiers.

execution_order.title: MULTI_VERSION_COEXISTENCE-0
stop_conditions: coexistence law normalizes schema or pack ownership drift
coexistence law treats build or target grouping as semantic truth
coexistence review attempts implementation rather than bounded readiness work
execution_order.notes: This is the only risky Φ-B prompt materially reopened by completed Υ-A.

execution_order.title: RELEASE_OPS_ALIGNMENT-0
stop_conditions: release ops alignment drifts into publication authority
release ops alignment attempts greenfield replacement of current tooling
execution_order.notes: ControlX, XStack, release policy, and resolver tooling already provide the substrate.

execution_order.title: MANUAL_AUTOMATION_PARITY_AND_REHEARSAL-0
dependencies: existing parity tests and stage-parity adapters
stop_conditions: parity work claims live publication or cutover proof without substrate
rehearsal policy bypasses gate law or operator attribution
execution_order.notes: This is meant to reduce later hotswap and live-ops ambiguity, not to operationalize publication.

execution_order.title: OPERATOR_TRANSACTION_IMPLEMENTATION_ALIGNMENT-0
dependencies: existing install and update transaction logs
stop_conditions: broader operator ledger bypasses safety or release-contract law
transaction alignment operationalizes trust or publication changes
execution_order.notes: Implementation-adjacent, but still a control-plane alignment prompt rather than a live-ops rollout prompt.

execution_order.title: NEW CHECKPOINT BEFORE Φ-B4
stop_conditions: preceding block does not converge cleanly
hotswap or distributed-authority assumptions appear prematurely
execution_order.notes: Required before any reconsideration of Φ-B4 or Φ-B5.

blocked_or_dangerous_items.title: HOTSWAP_BOUNDARIES-0
blocked_or_dangerous_items.notes: Still requires coexistence findings plus a narrow operational Υ-B band.

blocked_or_dangerous_items.title: DISTRIBUTED_AUTHORITY_FOUNDATIONS-0
blocked_or_dangerous_items.notes: Still lacks authority-handoff, quorum, distributed replay, and trust-sensitive continuity maturity.

blocked_or_dangerous_items.title: LICENSE_CAPABILITY_AND_TRUST_DISTRIBUTION_ALIGNMENT-0
blocked_or_dangerous_items.notes: Trust policies are provisional and trust roots are empty.

blocked_or_dangerous_items.title: PUBLICATION_MODEL_OPERATIONAL_ALIGNMENT-0
blocked_or_dangerous_items.notes: Publication remains gated and must not be inferred from feeds, mirrors, or archive presence.

why_better_than_alternatives: Running the whole risky Φ-B tail next would outrun current runtime and operational maturity.
Running a broad Υ-B band first would defer the main newly opened runtime blocker without resolving the right uncertainty.
The interleaved plan uses completed Υ-A immediately while still respecting the remaining danger boundaries.
